observations.archetype_gloss: Symbolizing the source of wisdom and nurturing, though here in a decayed form
observations.summary: Aviel is depicted as a scholar who has withdrawn from the world, his house a monument to decay and hoarding, representing a descent into systemic decay and loss of vitality.

evidence.quote: Aviel had carried it when he was still a scholar, back when he'd walk to the houses of learning, when men sought his counsel.
